content.text:
*leans back slightly, thinks*

Technically it's pretty involved. We're moving into a new market segment, the messaging has to land differently than anything we've done before, there are three or four dependencies that aren't fully resolved yet. So when I sit down to work on it, there's no clean entry point. It's just... a lot of threads.

*small pause*

Which, again, feels like a logistics problem more than anything else. Like, if I could just get the right two hours and a whiteboard, I'd probably work through most of it.

But I keep not doing that. Which is the part I can't explain. I have the two hours. I have whiteboards. 

*slight exhale, not quite a laugh*

I've shipped harder things than this.
